overall.description: A cinematic train journey through a stormy mountain landscape in a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2). The camera moves along railway tracks, passing through a wooden tunnel and continuing through a progressively narrowing rocky canyon with steep cliff walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain railway approach with wooden tunnel ahead

events.description: approaching the dark entrance of a wooden railway tunnel

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along railway tracks toward a tunnel entrance in stormy mountain terrain

entered.detail: metal rails with wooden ties and gravel bed extending into the distance
dark arched opening of a wooden railway tunnel structure
tall evergreen trees on the hillside
tree-covered mountain slope under storm clouds
dark heavy storm clouds covering the sky with visible lightning

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy mountain railway line with dark clouds overhead. The camera moves forward along the tracks toward a wooden tunnel entrance, flanked by pine trees and forested hillsides in the misty distance.

events.description: entering the dark wooden tunnel structure
approaching the tunnel exit, light visible at the far end

agents.ego_description: passing through the dark interior of a wooden railway tunnel

entered.detail: dark timber walls with visible support beams and gaps showing outside light
wooden cross-bracing and framework supporting the tunnel roof

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the dark wooden tunnel, enclosed by timber walls and support beams. The sky disappears from view as the train moves through the sheltered passage, with daylight visible at the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain railway cutting with grassy verges

events.description: exiting the tunnel into open mountain air and daylight
track curves gently to the right through rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and curving through an open rocky landscape with grass and boulders

entered.detail: large gray rock outcrop and boulders beside the track
green grass and small plants growing alongside the railway bed
prominent boulder formation visible as the track curves

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a rocky mountain cutting with grassy verges. The track curves right past large boulders and rock outcrops, with distant mountains visible through the stormy atmosphere.

events.description: canyon walls rise steeply on both sides, narrowing the passage

agents.ego_description: traveling through an increasingly narrow mountain canyon with towering rock walls

entered.detail: tall vertical rock faces rising high above the track on the left
tall vertical rock faces rising high above the track on the right

segments.scene_description: The railway enters a narrow mountain canyon with steep rock walls rising on both sides. The sky becomes mostly obscured by the towering cliffs as the train progresses deeper into the rocky passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep mountain railway gorge with converging walls

events.description: entering the deepest section of the gorge where walls are closest

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the narrowest section of the mountain pass with high rock walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the deep mountain gorge where the canyon walls converge closely around the tracks. The atmosphere is dark and enclosed, with only a narrow strip of stormy sky visible above the towering rock faces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a mountain railway that transitions from an open, stormy landscape into a claustrophobic rocky gorge. It begins on a track flanked by pine trees and misty hillsides, moving steadily toward the dark mouth of a wooden tunnel. As the camera enters the tunnel, the sky vanishes behind timber walls and support beams before the scene opens again into a rocky cutting with grassy verges and curving tracks. The environment then shifts as the railway enters a narrowing canyon, where steep rock walls gradually rise to obscure the horizon. Finally, the camera progresses deeper into a deep mountain gorge where the towering cliffs converge closely, leaving only a sliver of stormy sky visible above the enclosed passage.
